title: All stream names use RedisStreams constants
evidence: Grep for hardcoded stream:* strings found matches only in test files
expected: No hardcoded stream names in production code
actual: No hardcoded stream names in production code

title: Consumer groups consistent with inventory
evidence: coordinator-group, execution-engine-group, cross-chain-detector-group, mempool-detector-group, orderflow-pipeline, failover-* all found in code matching inventory

title: All 24 streams have MAXLEN configured
evidence: STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS at streams.ts:402-430 covers all 24 streams. Only raw this.xadd() at line 738 is inside xaddWithLimit() wrapper.

title: No changes to stream consumer files
evidence: Incremental: StreamConsumer handles ACK internally. No relevant files changed.

title: Env var documentation comprehensive after recent 49-var addition
evidence: .env.example has 121 active + 473 commented vars. Commits fa79845a + aa40c116 added 49 vars.

title: No || 0 anti-pattern in production code
evidence: All || 0 matches in test files only

title: HMAC signing fully configured and enforced
evidence: STREAM_SIGNING_KEY at .env.example:616, STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS at :620. Enforcement in streams.ts:459.

title: All 23 feature flags documented
evidence: All FEATURE_* flags from feature-flags.ts found in .env.example

title: Risk configuration complete with cross-validation
evidence: All risk vars documented. Cross-validation at risk-config.ts:328.

title: BCRYPT_ROUNDS parseInt without parseEnvInt utility
evidence: shared/security/src/auth.ts:96 uses parseInt(process.env.BCRYPT_ROUNDS || '12')

title: Redis clients fully aligned
evidence: Both: connectTimeout=3000, maxRetriesPerRequest=3, lazyConnect=true, retryStrategy=capped exponential (never null)

title: No port collisions
evidence: unified-detector=3007 (fixed), all ports unique per service-ports.json

title: No new silent errors in changed files
evidence: Incremental: cross-chain.strategy.ts has no empty catch blocks

title: No changes to stream serialization
evidence: Incremental: serialization files not changed

title: No new Redis key patterns
evidence: Incremental: no Redis key operations added in changed files

title: ADR-005 SharedArrayBuffer confirmed in L1 cache
evidence: price-matrix.ts lines 224, 438-449

title: ADR-002 No inter-service HTTP calls
evidence: Only CORS origins in middleware, no production inter-service HTTP

title: Circuit breaker default threshold inconsistency
evidence: circuit-breaker.ts:408 defaults 5, self-healing-manager.ts:36 defaults 3
recommendation: Align to 5 or document deviation in ADR-018

title: No infrastructure config changes
evidence: Incremental: no fly/*.toml or docker-compose changes

title: Timeout hierarchy consistent
evidence: SHUTDOWN=8000 > connectTimeout=3000 > closeServer=1000. Execution: drain=30000 + 15s buffer.

title: Stale price window configurable via parameter
evidence: price-matrix.ts:717 maxAgeMs=5000 default, callers configure as needed
